parameters.query: SELECT gc.*, c.domain, c.id as client_id FROM google_connections gc JOIN clients c ON gc.client_id = c.id WHERE gc.service = 'search_console' AND c.status = 'active'

=INSERT INTO keywords (client_id, keyword, search_volume, current_rank, source, is_tracked) VALUES ('{{$json.client_id}}', '{{$json.keyword}}', {{$json.search_volume}}, {{Math.round($json.position)}}, 'search_console', false) ON CONFLICT (client_id, keyword) DO UPDATE SET search_volume = EXCLUDED.search_volume, current_rank = {{Math.round($json.position)}}, updated_at = now()

=INSERT INTO agent_action_log (client_id, module, action_type, summary, details, status, triggered_by) VALUES ('{{$json.client_id}}', 'intelligence', 'search_console_sync', 'Synced Search Console data: {{$json.keyword}} (pos: {{Math.round($json.position)}})', '{"clicks": {{$json.clicks}}, "impressions": {{$json.impressions}}, "ctr": {{$json.ctr}}}', 'success', 'n8n-sc-sync')
